issues.title: Double tasks generated for Loan Simple leads in post-referral workflow
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were triggering duplicate tasks across multiple workflows, including pre-referral and post-referral workflows. HAs and TCs were receiving redundant tasks for the same leads. Root cause was identified as a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations in HubSpot.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually dismiss or reconcile duplicate tasks.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping when deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: Deals marked as Closed Lost or Transferred were continuing to generate post-referral workflow check-in tasks instead of halting. HAs were receiving weekly check-in tasks for deals that had already been closed or transferred. Root cause was a missing or incorrect filter/suppression condition in the post-referral workflow.
issues.workaround: Manually dismiss any lingering tasks for deals marked Closed Lost or Transferred during the impact window.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-triggering after deal stage reverted and reset
issues.desc: When a deal was set to Offer Accepted, reverted to a prior stage, and then set back to Offer Accepted, the TC workflow and associated tasks did not re-trigger. TCs missed closing info collection tasks as a result. Root cause was that 'deal stage = Offer Accepted' was not included as a re-enrollment criterion in the workflow.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll affected deals into the TC workflow to ensure closing info collection tasks are generated.

issues.title: Automated emails showing previous loan officer after LO change
issues.desc: When a loan officer was updated on a deal, automated emails continued to reference the previous LO rather than the newly assigned one. The agent-facing automated email displayed the old LO's information. Root cause appeared to be a product-level data sync issue rather than a workflow configuration problem.
issues.workaround: Manually verify and resend any automated agent emails for deals that had an LO change during the impact window.

issues.title: TC workflow not triggering for MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted
issues.desc: MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted were not enrolling into the TC workflow, meaning TCs received no tasks for these deals. HAs had to manually send closing info collection emails. Root cause was identified with HubSpot support, though the specific technical detail was not disclosed in the thread.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted during the impact window into the TC workflow and send closing info emails manually.
